ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size conversion is applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size conversion is applicable */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Size in Italy (IT) format */,
  "uk_au_size" INTEGER /* Size in United Kingdom/Australia (UK/AU) format */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size in United States (US) format */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size in France (FR) format */,
  "de_size" INTEGER /* Size in Germany (DE) format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size (reference to size_conversion table) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred size (reference to size_conversion table) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user interface */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the user */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred size (reference to size_conversion table) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the profile is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the total price is denominated */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "size_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the size accuracy (e.g., fits well, runs small) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Euro) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the currency is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, de) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, German) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
